core_mechanism: Bayesian inference of a parameterized model's parameters from noisy observations via Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling of the posterior, propagating measurement and systematic uncertainties into posterior credible ranges on the parameters
brief_reason: The abstract fits a parameterized equation of state to a heterogeneous observed dataset using a Markov Chain Monte Carlo algorithm within a Bayesian framework to infer model parameters and their constrained ranges while accounting for systematic uncertainties.
